glossary.subject: Spark minor ticket(CTASK) creation failure Spark ticket: {{ mappings.ticketNumber }} DNE Order No: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

A Normal change ticket {{ mappings.ticketNumber }} has been raised and Authorized for Metro Migration Phase1 order {{ mappings.orderNumber }}, but minor ticket creation is failing.

Please ensure 'Allow Minor Changes' option is enabled for this Spark Change.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
